examples: The level of nitrogenase activity was correlated reciprocally with the content of cell phycocyanin and the light intensity.
Selenium-containing phycocyanin(Se-PC)was purified from Se-enriched Spirulina platensis using ion exchange and gel filtration chromatography.
In the living algae cell, phycocyanin can serve as a protein storage unit and as an antioxidant, protecting the cell from certain wavelengths light damage.
